case_title: ARUSHA BAKER VS. SWISH GROUP (USA) INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, ARUSHA AS TO DEFENDANT SWISH GROUP (USA) INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKER, ARUSHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWISH GROUP (USA) INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION $18,226.46 PRINCIPAL, $43.56 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,600.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT AS TO ASSIGNEE: LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, ARUSHA AS TO DEFENDANT SWISH GROUP (USA) INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
